---
title: "Preparation Exercises"
---

## Exercise A: Expected cost

Create a vector of costs and calculate the mean.

```{r}
#| eval: false
costs <- c(1000, 1500, 3000, 5000)
mean(costs)
```

## Exercise B: Transition matrix

Create a simple transition matrix for a three-state Markov model.

```{r}
#| eval: false
tpm <- matrix(
  c(0.85, 0.10, 0.05,
    0.00, 0.80, 0.20,
    0.00, 0.00, 1.00),
  nrow = 3,
  byrow = TRUE
)

rownames(tpm) <- colnames(tpm) <- c("Healthy", "Sick", "Dead")
tpm
```

## Exercise C: Simple simulation

Simulate 1,000 draws from a beta distribution.

```{r}
#| eval: false
set.seed(123)
p <- rbeta(1000, shape1 = 20, shape2 = 80)
summary(p)
```
